revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-4-300

The process of starting a motor with the primary or the secondary winding in series with starting resistors that are short-circuited for the normal running conditions.
